summary: Employee Wellness Assessment application with admin dashboard for monitoring submissions and generating wellness reports
architectural_notes: Assessment form submits data and generates wellness report upon completion
Admin dashboard displays all submitted assessments
Complete Assessment button triggers submission workflow
known_issues: Complete Assessment button not responding to clicks - submission functionality not working

existing_features.title: Fix the Complete Assessment button click handler in Section4.tsx to properly trigger the assessment submission process when clicked
Ensure assessment data is successfully submitted to the Motoko backend via actor.submitAssessment() when Complete Assessment button is clicked
After successful assessment submission, automatically navigate user to the Wellness Report page displaying their results
Verify that submitted assessments appear in the Admin Dashboard after submission
